login.subtitle: Type your name to enter the desktop
login.footerRight: After logon you can continue to the desktop

profile.title: Professional profile
profile.bio: Student of Multiplatform Application Development (DAM) with a proactive and hardworking profile; creative and team-oriented, with strong planning skills and high flexibility and adaptability to take on new challenges and changing environments.

project1.title: The Witcher Web
project1.summary: A simple browser videogame inspired by The Witcher universe — small gameplay loop, sprite-based graphics and basic state management.

project2.title: First Angular project
project2.summary: A compact tutorial SPA to learn Angular fundamentals: components, routing, forms and basic HTTP integration.

project3.title: Portfolio
project3.summary: A Windows XP–style personal portfolio showcasing projects, skills and résumé, with multilingual support and lightweight UI polish.

projects.spotify: This project is an Android application inspired by Spotify, offering a personalized music experience, allowing users to register, log in, explore songs, artists and playlists, as well as manage their profile (including profile picture from the camera). The project integrates Firebase (Firestore), Supabase Storage and the Deezer API. It is oriented as an educational project.
projects.eventvs: Mobile application that centralizes all cultural and leisure information of Mérida in a single digital space. It allows users to discover events, places of interest, restaurants and more, with an intuitive and easy-to-use interface. The project is under development, with the intention of offering a complete and attractive experience for residents and visitors of Mérida. It is oriented as a TFG project.
